product.one_line_description: Vonage provides Communication and Network APIs covering voice, video, messaging, network features, AI, and security services for developers.

authentication.auth_summary: The Vonage platform supports JWT authentication. Other methods like API keys are not explicitly mentioned in the provided text as supported for developer access.

developer_access.access_notes: Developers can create a free account directly from the developer portal to gain access.

api_surface.api_summary: Vonage offers a broad range of public APIs for communication and network features. This includes Voice APIs (for smart notifications, IVRs, voice bots, speech/text-to-speech, in-app calls), Video APIs (for real-time video in web, desktop, mobile, IoT apps with client/server SDKs), Messaging APIs (for diverse channels like SMS, RCS, WhatsApp), Network Features APIs (for identity insights, location retrieval), Low Code and AI tools (for conversational flows), and Privacy/Security APIs (for fraud prevention, authentication, number insight). APIs are accessible via REST and various SDKs (Web, Mobile, Desktop, Server-side).

mcp.mcp_summary: No Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar standardized framework for AI agent interactions was found. There is a mention of 'Vonage API Power for Kiro' which is a specific integration with an AWS agentic IDE, but not a general MCP.

buildability.verdict_reasoning: Critical atomic facts regarding public API availability or credential gating remain unclear.
